title: Self-Evolving Trading Agent Stage 1：LangGraph Minimal Durable Workflow

decisions.brief: Stage 1 MVP 是 Decision + Outcome，暂不强制 paper execution
Stage 1 采用 LangGraph minimal runtime
Multimodal Market Intelligence Graph 是 context provider
受控 ReAct，区分 InsightCandidate 与 AcceptedLesson
AcceptedLesson 必须经过 replay/outcome evidence
DecisionGraph 只消费 ContextSnapshot + evidence_refs
Raw Evidence 经 processors 转为 WeightedContextItem
权重采用规则基础权重 + LLM rerank + 上限约束
历史 ContextSnapshot 不可变，outcome 只影响未来权重策略
只有 durable/HITL/long-running workflow 使用 LangGraph
Stage 1 包含 InsightExplorationGraph v0，只产出 InsightCandidate
TUI 后移，Stage 1 使用 CLI/report/LangGraph UI
domain DB 与 LangGraph checkpoint store 分离
Stage 1 最小新增 domain tables
outcome horizons 为 30m/1h/EOD/1d/3d
outcome label 采用 absolute + relative benchmark + invalidation/target proxy
按 action 分层要求 trade_plan / invalidation / target
保留 PAPER_*_CANDIDATE，但 Stage 1 不执行 paper order
允许 HumanOverride，但原始 DecisionEnvelope 不可变
采用 model_path / override_path 双轨评估
Stage 1 只做 promotion recommendation，不自动升级模型
PromotionRecommendation 先做当前模型单臂评估，不强制 challenger
CLI 通过 workflow app JSON command contract 触发 workflow，不直接 import graph/runtime
LangGraph checkpoint 默认写入 data/trader-workflows/checkpoints.sqlite，可由 TRADER_WORKFLOWS_CHECKPOINT_DB 覆盖
Stage 1 backend API 统一挂在 /api/intel/stage1，负责 domain facts 的 create/list/detail 与不可变写入约束
apps/trader-workflows 自有 LLM provider；CLI provider 只可作为 env 命名参考，不可 import
DecisionGraph 预创建 decision_outcomes pending rows；OutcomeGraph 只 finalize due pending rows
S1 采用 @langchain/langgraph + 项目内 SQLite checkpoint/run-store facade

app_boundaries.apps/trader-workflows: LangGraph durable runtime, graph implementations, checkpoint store, and graph-level tests
app_boundaries.apps/trader-agent/backend: market_intel.db domain schema/API only; no LangGraph runtime
app_boundaries.apps/trader-cli: thin command wrappers only; no graph implementation

reference_only_modules.apps/trader-cli/src/api/client.ts: Read for TRADER_API_BASE convention only; apps/trader-workflows must own its own api client and must not import from trader-cli.
reference_only_modules.apps/trader-cli/src/llm/provider.ts: Read for LLM env naming only; apps/trader-workflows must own apps/trader-workflows/src/llm/provider.ts and must not import from trader-cli.

workflow_cli_contract.wrapper_rule: apps/trader-cli commands spawn the workflow app command with --json, pass through non-zero exit codes, and do not import apps/trader-workflows source files.

json_envelope.status: queued | running | interrupted | succeeded | failed | cancelled | null

commands.expect: Lists workflow runtime runs from the checkpoint/run store.
Shows run metadata, current node, status, timestamps, checkpoint reference, and latest error if any.
Resumes an interrupted or resumable run without creating a duplicate domain decision.
Starts DecisionGraph v0 and returns run_id plus persisted decision_id when completed.
Returns latest evaluation report with hold or needs_more_data recommendation.

dependency_strategy.adapter: apps/trader-workflows/src/runtime/checkpointStore.ts exports a Stage1CheckpointStore facade over the local SQLite checkpoint/run store
dependency_strategy.rule: Graph code depends on Stage1CheckpointStore, not raw SQLite. If an official LangGraph SQLite saver is added later, wrap it behind the same facade without changing graph or CLI contracts.

runtime_state_contract.separation_rule: Runtime run metadata and checkpoints live in the LangGraph checkpoint/run store; trading-domain facts live only behind the backend Stage 1 API.

stage1_api_contract.idempotency_rule: Create endpoints must accept deterministic ids or idempotency keys. Repeating the same id with the same payload returns the existing record; repeating with different immutable payload returns 409.

error_semantics.409: immutable record conflict or duplicate different payload

decision_outcomes.lifecycle: DecisionGraph pre-creates one pending row per decision_id + horizon + path. OutcomeGraph reads due pending rows and finalizes each row exactly once.
transition_rules: label can transition pending to labeled, skipped, or failed
final rows cannot be relabeled or rewritten
duplicate schedule with same decision_id + horizon + path and same payload is idempotent
duplicate schedule with different payload returns 409

llm_provider_contract.rule: DecisionGraph and InsightExplorationGraph use the workflow-owned provider. Do not import the CLI provider into apps/trader-workflows.

acceptance.check: ADR and spec record LangGraph minimal durable runtime as Stage 1 architecture and supersede old Decision Store + TUI-only T006 direction
Stage 1 architecture separates market_intel.db domain facts from LangGraph checkpoint store runtime state
Context pipeline is defined as Raw Evidence -> processors -> WeightedContextItem -> immutable ContextSnapshot
DecisionGraph, OutcomeGraph, EvaluationGraph, and InsightExplorationGraph v0 are the only Stage 1 durable graphs
OutcomeGraph covers 30m/1h/EOD/1d/3d and labels absolute return, relative benchmark return, invalidation proxy, and target proxy
InsightExplorationGraph v0 can only persist InsightCandidate; AcceptedLesson requires replay/outcome evidence and is not part of Stage 1 auto-promotion
HumanOverride preserves immutable original DecisionEnvelope and uses model_path / override_path dual-track evaluation
Stage 1 defers self-built TUI pages, paper execution, broker mirror, auto-training, auto-promotion, and complete model registry
CLI wrappers use the workflow app JSON command contract and do not import graph/runtime implementation
Stage 1 backend API exposes explicit create/list/detail routes with immutable/idempotent write semantics
Workflow runtime owns checkpoint path, Stage1CheckpointStore facade, and LLM provider instead of importing CLI internals
DecisionGraph pre-creates pending decision_outcomes rows and OutcomeGraph finalizes due pending rows exactly once

non_goals: self-built TUI pages for Decisions/Outcomes/Insights/Eval in Stage 1
automatic model promotion or model switching
LLM-only promotion from InsightCandidate to AcceptedLesson

verification.command: Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 .agent-dev/specs/self-evolving-agent-stage1/spec.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 .agent-dev/specs/self-evolving-agent-stage1/decision-record.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null
verification.expect: Stage 1 spec and decision record parse as JSON

verification.command: manual: Review Stage 1 architecture against project-docs/research-reports/deep-research-report.md, CONTEXT.md, and project-docs/adr/0001-langgraph-minimal-stage1.md
verification.expect: Accepted decisions, non-goals, graph boundaries, storage split, outcome horizons, and T006 supersession are consistent
No whitespace errors in architecture artifacts
Stage 1 domain schema/API tests pass for context snapshots, decisions, outcomes, insight candidates, evaluation reports, and weighting policy stats
WeightedContextItem and immutable ContextSnapshot service tests pass
LangGraph runtime foundation supports checkpoint, resume, run status, and checkpoint/domain-store separation
DecisionGraph validates immutable DecisionEnvelope, persists decision/context snapshot, and pre-creates pending outcome rows for fixed horizons without paper execution

verification.command: cd apps/trader-workflows && npm test -- src/graphs/outcomeGraph.test.ts src/services/outcomes.test.ts
verification.expect: OutcomeGraph reads due pending rows and finalizes them exactly once with 30m/1h/EOD/1d/3d labels, absolute return, benchmark-relative return, invalidation proxy, and target proxy fields

verification.command: cd apps/trader-workflows && npm test -- src/graphs/evaluationGraph.test.ts src/services/evaluation.test.ts
verification.expect: EvaluationGraph reports model_path, override_path, human override delta, and hold/needs_more_data recommendation without auto-promotion
InsightExplorationGraph controlled ReAct persists InsightCandidate only and cannot create AcceptedLesson, trade, train, or promote

verification.command: manual: run `npm run trader-cli -- runs list --json`, `npm run trader-cli -- decide TSLA.US --json`, capture `run_id`, run `npm run trader-cli -- runs show <RUN_ID_FROM_DECIDE> --json`, `npm run trader-cli -- outcomes run --due --json`, `npm run trader-cli -- eval summary --json`, and `npm run trader-cli -- insights explore --symbol TSLA.US --window 30d --json`; then review diff against forbidden/non-goal modules
verification.expect: CLI commands return the workflow JSON envelope, wrappers remain thin, report artifacts work, and diff contains no self-built TUI, paper execution, broker mirror, auto-training, auto-promotion, or legacy hypotheses/predictions dual-write
